title: Audition: functional calculus sgn(X), |X|, theta(X), x^alpha
description: Realizes fc-abs-sgn (tex 514-522) and prop_P (tex 524). Candidate routes to audition (NOT decisions): Denman-Beavers iteration vs Newton-Schulz vs Hermitian eigendecomposition vs Taylor. Precondition ||X^2-I||<1 asserted. Arb-critical: |X| near-singular, spectral fragility (tex 540). Shard B.

title: Audition harness: red-green TDD + correctness + performance benchmarks
description: The core exploratory engine. For any routine, support: (a) write failing assertion first; (b) correctness gates = double-vs-arb@prec=53 agreement, exact special cases, and the global eta=0 oracle (exact idempotent => exact Choi-Effros C* structure, zero defect); (c) performance benchmarking so algorithm candidates are ranked on speed too. NO algorithm is presumed fit; the harness exists to audition competing candidates and retire losers. Mirrors su2-fft make test (~5s) + PROFILING.md discipline.

title: Milestone: eta=0 vertical slice (mat->funcalc->ucp->idemp_structure)
description: First integration target (MODULE_PLAN.md 'suggested first vertical slice'): drive an EXACTLY idempotent Phi through mat->funcalc->ucp->idemp_structure; validate via the eta=0 oracle (reconstruct M,A,Delta,Gamma exactly; rebuild Phi and compare; zero defect). Fast regression base before the harder projection/cstar_build work.

title: Audition: matrix substrate (norms, Herm eig, SVD, Kronecker, partial trace)
description: Complex matrix type, double (LAPACK zheev/zgesvd/zgees) + arb (acb_mat). Operations needed downstream: operator norm (via SVD), Frobenius norm, Hermitian eigensolve, SVD, Kronecker tensor product, partial trace, reshape. Audition implementations on correctness+perf. Layer 0.

title: Scaffold dual number-path build (C11 + FLINT/arb + LAPACK)
description: include/aic.h API + storage-layout contract; Makefile (make test, make bench); link FLINT>=3.0 (arb/acb) + LAPACK/BLAS; flags -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wshadow -Wstrict-prototypes -O2 -g -std=c11. Skeleton for double path and acb path side by side. No algorithms yet.

title: Audition: UCP map representations (Choi/Stinespring/Kraus) + conversions + cb-norm + carrier
description: Core data structures (shard G): Choi matrix C_Phi, isometry V (Phi(X)=V^dag(X tensor 1_F)V), Kraus K_a. Conversions; CP<=>Choi PSD; unital<=>partial trace=I; cb-norm (via Choi/SDP); carrier (lem_carrier tex 1724, cor_carrier 1731). Audition representations + cb-norm estimators on correctness+perf. Layer 1.

title: Infrastructure: dual-path build + TDD/benchmark harness
description: Project scaffolding for the C+FLINT/arb cores and the audition harness. Everything downstream is exploratory: no algorithm is presumed fit; each is red-green TDD auditioned against correctness AND performance benchmarks. See CLAUDE.md, MODULE_PLAN.md.

title: Foundations: matrix substrate, functional calculus, UCP reps
description: Layer 0-1 of the module DAG (MODULE_PLAN.md): mat, funcalc, contraction, ucp. Substrate everything else builds on. Shards B (analytic tools) and G (UCP maps).

title: Audition: idempotent-structure algorithm (th_idemp_structure)
description: Exact idempotent UCP Phi -> subspace M, C* algebra A, UCP maps Delta, Gamma with Gamma C_M Delta=1_A, Delta Gamma C_M=Phi (tex 318 stmt / 2055 proof). Steps: carrier M, A=Img(Phi) eigenspace-1, Delta inclusion, Gamma (prop_Gamma 2106), homomorphism check (lem_idemp 1916). The cleanest theorem for the eta=0 oracle. Audition carrier/eigenspace extraction on correctness+perf. Shard G.

title: Audition: incremental C* construction = master loop (proof of th_main)
description: The central algorithm (shard E master loop): B as partitioned index set + matrix units E_jk; Stage1 commutative skeleton, Stage2 extend blocks (lem_extension tex 1378), Stage3 merge (cor_merge_sum 1352, lem_add_dim 1363, lem_merging 1325); cor_improvement after each step keeps delta_0=c_0*eps. Output O(eps)-iso v:B->A. Audition orderings/heuristics on correctness+perf; assert constant does NOT grow with dim.

title: Research: extract explicit universal constant c_0 (cor_improvement) + verify dim-independence
description: cor_improvement's constant fixes the O(eps) constant in th_main. Extract it explicitly and confirm (empirically + by argument) it does NOT grow with dim A (the failure mode of the naive Haar/cohomology route, tex 484). MODULE_PLAN.md escalation 3.

title: Research: reconstruct th_factorization proof closure (CP-ization steps 4-5)
description: th_factorization's proof is an OUTLINE; the UCP CP-ization (unitary 1-design) and decode Upsilon (lem_RC) constructions are prose, not a closed proof linking to the stated bounds DelUps/UpsDel2 (shard H). Reconstruct the closure before T-factorize is trustworthy. MODULE_PLAN.md escalation 4.

title: Research: finite N for cb-norm truncation (conjecture n <= dim A)
description: cb-norm is a sup over all ampliations 1_{M_n} tensor (.). Numerically 'for all n' must be truncated. Determine/prove the finite N (conjecture n <= dim A, shard F) needed before T-opspace can claim a certified cb-bound. MODULE_PLAN.md escalation 2.

title: Research: prove an Omega(1) spectral gap always exists for dim A>1
description: T-projection Route A relies on a Hermitian element of A having a usable spectral gap. The paper proves existence of a nontrivial projection topologically; we need the structural finite-dim guarantee that a gap exists (or a certified failure mode). Until proven, projection auditions certify per-instance and escalate on failure. MODULE_PLAN.md escalation 1.

title: Open research questions / escalations
description: Constructivization gaps the paper leaves open (MODULE_PLAN.md escalations). Tracked separately so module work can proceed with per-instance certification while proofs are pursued.

title: Audition: associated eps-C* algebra of an eta-idempotent map (th_almost_idemp)
description: th_almost_idemp (tex 2192): Phi_tilde=theta(2Phi-1) regularization; A=Img(Phi_tilde); star-product => extended O(eta)-C* algebra. Key: associativity eqs Phi_assoc1/Phi_assoc2 (proofs at 2208/2239/2639). Audition the regularization + structure verification on correctness+perf. Shard H.

title: Audition: delta-homomorphism approximation (lem_approx, prop_delta_hominc)
description: lem_approx (tex 1224-1316): approximate a delta-homomorphism by a genuine homomorphism via the multiplicativity defect (Newton-type iteration). prop_delta_hominc (1194). Audition iteration variants on correctness+perf. Shard E.

title: Main theorem construction: dhom, errreduce, cstar_build, opspace
description: Layer 4-6 (MODULE_PLAN.md): delta-homomorphism approximation, error reduction, the incremental C* construction (the master loop = proof of th_main), and operator-space/cb-norm tensor extension (th_main_ext). Shards E and F.

title: Audition: compression maps & corner algebra (lem_alpha/PQ_Hilb/PQR/1d_proj)
description: Co_{P,Q} compressions, corner subspaces S_{P,Q}, compressed product, block bijection alpha (lem_alpha tex 1086), Hilbert structure on 1-dim corners (lem_PQ_Hilb 1123), lem_PQR (1162), lem_1d_proj (1179), equivalence classes. Mostly explicit/constructive. Shard D.

title: Audition: eps-C* algebra data model + axiom-defect estimators
description: Represent A as operator subspace of M_N with star-product (Choi-Effros X*Y=Phi(XY)), norm, involution, unit. Estimators for associativity defect (tex 413), C*-defect (428), unit defect (432). Definitions tex 407/443. Audition norm/defect estimators on correctness+perf. Shards A,B.

title: Audition: constructive nontrivial-projection finder (CONSTRUCTIVIZATION CRUX)
description: lem_nontriv_projection (tex 931) is proved NON-CONSTRUCTIVELY (Lefschetz-Hopf + H-space). Finite-dim candidate routes to audition (shard D, none presumed): Route A Hermitian eigensolve + spectral-gap split + theta(2P-I) snap + arb gap certification; Route B near-involution on U; Route C minimize ||P^2-P|| over Hermitian P bounded from +-I. Audition all on correctness+perf; keep multiple alive until benchmarks retire one. Arb-critical: gap ~ eps.

title: Audition: Banach fixed-point inverse/implicit-function solver (lem_invfun)
description: lem_invfun (tex 564-592) IS a constructive algorithm: the iteration x_n = g_y(x_{n-1}), g_y(x)=x+V^{-1}(y-f(x)), with rate c<1. Audition stopping criteria / acceleration variants on correctness+perf. Shard B.

title: Headline: idempotent structure & channel factorization
description: Layer 7 (MODULE_PLAN.md): th_idemp_structure algorithm, associated eps-C* algebra of an eta-idempotent map (th_almost_idemp), and the end-to-end factorization (th_factorization). Shards G and H.

title: Audition: approximate unitary group (polar decomp + group ops)
description: prop_polar (tex 809), lem_gV (758), lem_U_delta (699). Candidate polar-factor routes to audition: SVD vs Newton-Schulz; charts via contraction (lem_gV). Group ops mu, sigma. Substrate for projection. Shard C.

title: Audition: error reduction via explicit diagonal (cor_improvement)
description: cor_improvement (tex 1317): improve a delta-inclusion to a delta_0=O(eps)-inclusion, constant independent of delta and of dim. Constructive: explicit Heisenberg-Weyl diagonal of the GENUINE C* algebra B (no n-blowup, unlike naive Haar tex 484). Audition implementation + verify dimension-independence empirically. Shard E.

title: Audition: end-to-end channel factorization (th_factorization)
description: Headline 7-step pipeline (shard H): regularize Phi -> associated A -> th_main_ext gives B,v -> CP-ize Delta (unitary 1-design) -> decode Upsilon (lem_RC tex 2840) -> unitalize -> verify ||Delta Upsilon - Phi||_cb=O(eta). Dual: Enc=Upsilon*, Dec=Delta*. PROOF IS AN OUTLINE (see R-factclosure). Audition the UCP realizations on correctness+perf; certify composite O(eta) bound in arb.

title: Epsilon-algebra machinery: ecstar, unitary, projection, corner
description: Layer 2-3 (MODULE_PLAN.md): the eps-C* algebra data model, exact-unit fix, approximate unitary group, the constructive nontrivial-projection finder, and corner/compression algebra. Shards C (unitaries) and D (projection/subspaces).

title: Audition: operator-space / cb-norm ampliation + th_main_ext
description: def:opspace (tex 1453), prop_inc_ext (1483), lem_approx_ext (1508), th_main_ext (1538): control all ampliations 1_{M_n} tensor (.) so the iso is cb-bounded. Open: which finite N truncates 'for all n' (see R-cbtrunc). Audition the extended construction + N-truncation on correctness+perf. Shard F.

title: Julia bindings: AlmostIdempotentChannels.jl (ccall)
description: Julia package wrapping the C cores via ccall (the su2-fft SU2FFT.jl pattern). High-level API + gold-standard cross-check in runtests.jl.

title: Julia ccall package AlmostIdempotentChannels.jl
description: ccall wrappers + accessors; local libaic.so build (deps/build.jl); gold-standard cross-check in test/runtests.jl. API: UCPMap (from Kraus/Choi), idemp_defect, associated_ecstar, main_isomorphism, factorize -> (B, Delta, Upsilon), channel_defect (certified O(eta) ball). Mirrors su2-fft SU2FFT.jl.

title: Audition: exact-unit normalization (prop_unit)
description: prop_unit (tex 672-688): achieve exact unit by O(eps)-change of unit and multiplication. Audition the normalization on correctness+perf. Shard B.
